headline: #64 Astro consumption — HDS-side SHIPPED on branch (claude/storybook-publishable-9tdovm), pending 0.12.0 release: new /brand subpath = a framework-free palette→HDS-semantic overlay bridge (brandOverlayVars/Style/Css, color-mix-derived accent states, 9 tests, minor changeset) + docs/CONSUMING.md §12 static-Astro recipe (variables.css + data-brand + hydrate-only-islands). Per-component subpath exports DROPPED (bundlers already tree-shake the ESM barrel). #64-B PROVEN in hirobius/clients#30: the Astro client factory now themes off the HDS spine (@theme maps --color-* → --semantic-*, brandStyle() uses the bridge) — all 6 apps build green, each keeps its distinct palette, output carries the full HDS spine (119 semantic + 162 primitive vars), pixel-identical; proven against a pnpm-pack tarball. PRIOR (merged to main): layout-consistency epic #95 (all 4 workstreams — #92 Box+sx, #96 every-layout primitives, #97 AI guidance, #98 discipline gate + eslint-plugin) and #93 CSS-in-JS→Tailwind migration (6 PRs #103-#108); #60 cva coverage 36→48/131.
next: Publish @hirobius/design-system 0.12.0 (minor changeset carries /brand + overlay bridge). check:release/publish is human-only. Then hirobius/clients#30 runs pnpm install to wire the factory against the published version.
#60 Phase 4+: continue per-component cva review for primitives with a genuine prop-driven className axis; bounded ceiling is architectural (fixed Radix skins / no variant axis).
